title: LEGO Star Wars 75410 Mando and Grogu’s N-1 Starfighter Building Toy with The Mandalorian Minifugure, Grogu & R5-D4 Figures, plus a Brick-Built Fueling Station, Playset for 4+ Year Old Boys & Girls
features: Mando and Grogu’s N-1 Starfighter – Kids aged 4+ learn to build with LEGO bricks and create stories in the Star Wars: The Mandalorian universe
3 LEGO Star Wars characters – This Star Wars playset includes the Mandalorian LEGO minifigure, a Grogu LEGO figure and an R5-D4 LEGO droid figure
Simple LEGO 4+ model for kids – Features a Starter Brick base for easy building, an opening cockpit for The Mandalorian and a space for Grogu
Fun accessories – The Mandalorian minifigure has a darksaber and jetpack, Grogu has a hover pram, and the set also includes a fuel station to build
Star Wars gifts for 4+ year old boys and girls – This Star Wars: The Mandalorian buildable toy makes a fun treat and gift for preschool children
Fun family-bonding activity – Find step-by-step pictorial instructions in the box and check out the LEGO Builder app for digital viewing tools to make the creative experience extra fun
Build creativity – LEGO Star Wars sets for ages 4+ introduce young kids to more complex builds and the Star Wars universe, helping them develop their imaginations
description: From the manufacturer Learn-to-build LEGO Star Wars set for kids An engaging building toy for kids aged 4 and over to learn how to build and play out fun Star Wars: The Mandalorian stories. Ideal starter set for preschoolers The large Starter Brick helps to make building the N-1 Starfighter a fast and fun creative experience for young kids. LEGO Star Wars Mando and Grogu’s N-1 Starfighter Opening cockpit Place The Mandalorian in the cockpit. Passenger space Get Grogu on board, ready for launch. Buildable fuelling station Prepare the starfighter for the next mission. Simple building guides for preschoolers Find step-by-step pictorial instructions in the box and check out the LEGO Builder app for digital viewing tools. Playful LEGO Star Wars gift for kids The set includes The Mandalorian LEGO minifigure with a darksaber and jetpack element, Grogu with a hover pram, and R4-D5.

specifications_table.Manufacturer Warranty Description: If your new LEGO set is missing parts or has faulty parts, LEGO System A/S will replace these parts free of charge through our Bricks & Pieces service. We strive to make this free replacement available in all countries, but reserve the right to change the availability of the Bricks & Pieces service at any time without prior notice.
